nasb.text: and in the middle of the lampstands I saw one like a son of man, clothed in a robe reaching to the feet, and girded across His chest with a golden sash.

esv.text: and in the midst of the lampstands one like a son of man, clothed with a long robe and with a golden sash around his chest.

cnv.text: 燈臺中間有一位好像人子的，身上穿著直垂到腳的長衣，胸間束著金帶。

ccb.text: 有一位好像人子耶稣的站在这些灯台中间。祂长袍垂脚，金带围胸，

csbs.text: 灯台中间有一位仿佛人子的，身穿垂到脚的长袍，胸间束着金带。
